label: plain_text
text:
It can easily be seen
that there will be 9
such
pairs
in the Cartesian
product, since
there are 3 elements
in
each of the sets Aa
and B. This
gives us
9
possible codes. Also
note that the order in which these
elements are
e paired is crucial. For example, the code
(DL, 01)
will
not be the
the code
(01, DL).
sameas
